chapter_title.ar: بَابُ وَقْتِ مَا يَعْلَمُ الْإِمَامُ جَمِيعَ عِلْمِ الْإِمَامِ الَّذِي كَانَ قَبْلَهُ ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 57 – The time when the Imam<sup>asws</sup> learns the entirety of the knowledge of the Imam<sup>asws</sup> who was before him<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول كالحسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (175/ 3)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول كالحسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (175/ 3)

parts.text: جَمَاعَةٍ مَعَهُ قَالُوا سَمِعْنَا أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام )

text: يَعْرِفُ الَّذِي بَعْدَ الْإِمَامِ عِلْمَ مَنْ كَانَ قَبْلَهُ فِي آخِرِ دَقِيقَةٍ تَبْقَى مِنْ رُوحِهِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Ali Bin Asbat, from Al Hakam Bin Miskeen, from Ubeyd Bin Zurara and a group of people with him who said,

‘We heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘The Imam<sup>asws</sup> who is after recognises the knowledge of the one<sup>asws</sup> who was before him<sup>asws</sup> during the last minute remaining from his<sup>asws</sup> soul’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad has narrated from Muhammad ibn al-Husayn from Ali ibn Asbat from al-Hakam ibn Miskin from ‘Ubayd ibn Zurarah and a group with him who has said the following. “We heard abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) say, ‘The succeeding Imam comes to know of the knowledge of the preceding Imam in the last minute of the time left from his life.’”
